# Luxe Window Works — Custom Window Treatments in Northern Idaho

> Northern Idaho's trusted source for custom blinds, shades, shutters, and motorized window treatments. Local service, lifetime installation guarantee.

Luxe Window Works is a custom window treatment specialist based in Post Falls, Idaho, serving the greater Coeur d'Alene area and Inland Northwest. Founded by Mark Abplanalp — a 23-year industry veteran — Luxe Window Works specializes in energy-efficient window coverings, motorized smart home integration, and white-glove installation service.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/
- About: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/about
- Blog: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/blog
- Book a Free Consultation: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/book
- Contact: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/contact

## Products

- Cellular Shades (Honeycomb): https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/cellular-shades
- Solar Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/solar-shades
- Roller Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/roller-shades
- Roman Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/roman-shades
- Banded Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/banded-shades
- Motorization & Smart Home Integration: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/motorization
- Plantation Shutters: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/products/shutters

## Service Areas

- Coeur d'Alene, ID: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/areas/coeur-d-alene
- Post Falls, ID: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/areas/post-falls
- Hayden, ID: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/areas/hayden
- Rathdrum, ID: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/areas/rathdrum
- Sandpoint, ID: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/areas/sandpoint

## What We Do

- **Custom Blinds & Shades**: Cellular, roller, solar, roman, and banded shades custom-fitted to any window
- **Plantation Shutters**: Premium shutters for light control and privacy
- **Motorization & Smart Home Integration**: Bond Bridge Pro, motorized shades, smart scene automation
- **Energy Efficiency**: Cellular honeycomb shades reducing energy costs up to 20%, R-values up to 7.86
- **Child Safety**: Cordless and motorized options eliminating cord hazards
- **Free Consultation**: No-pressure in-home consultation and measurement

## Contact & Business Info

- Owner: Mark Abplanalp — 23-year window treatment industry expert
- Phone: (208) 660-8643
- Email: mark@luxewindowworks.com
- Address: 2972 N Pavo Ln, Post Falls, ID 83854
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 9am–2pm, Sun Closed
- Service Area: Coeur d'Alene, Post Falls, Hayden, Hayden Lake, Rathdrum, Sandpoint, Kootenai County

## Authority Signals

- 23 years industry expertise (since 2002)
- Lifetime installation guarantee
- Direct manufacturer relationships (Lafayette Interior Fashions, Norman Window Fashions)
- Specialization in smart home motorization and energy efficiency
- Commercial experience including Apple retail locations (Apple Visitor Center Cupertino, Apple Union Square San Francisco)
- Serving Northern Idaho homeowners since launching in Post Falls, March 2025
